creator: supraexpress@globaleyes.net

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -



There do not appear to be any compile or runtime options to specify a "device" (eg; CD/DVD).

How-To-Repeat: 

1) start brasero
2) load files to burn
3) "burn CD"
4) enter title
5) do burn
6) error
